Create an Angular standalone component for: $COMPONENT_NAME

Rules:
- Standalone: true, OnPush change detection
- Use signals for all state (signal, computed, effect)
- Use inject() for dependencies
- Use @if/@for control flow — never *ngIf/*ngFor
- Include: component.ts, component.html, component.scss, component.spec.ts
- BEM naming in SCSS
- All strings in Ukrainian if UI-facing

Output all 4 files with complete implementation.
